Module cache 

Source

Structs§

GRAPH_CACHE 🔒
XML_CACHE 🔒

Functions§

check_cache
check_disk_xml_cache
Check the disk cache for a previously fetched Overpass XML response. Returns None on any error — a cache miss is always safe.
check_xml_cache
clear_cache
clear_disk_cache
Delete all files in the disk cache directory.
disk_cache_dir
Returns the disk cache directory, overridable via OSM_GRAPH_CACHE_DIR. Defaults to a cache/ folder in the current working directory — the same convention used by OSMnx, so researchers get persistent, visible caching next to their notebooks and scripts.
disk_xml_path 🔒
fnv1a 🔒
FNV-1a 64-bit hash — stable across Rust versions, no dependencies.
insert_into_cache
insert_into_xml_cache
write_disk_xml_cache
Persist an Overpass XML response to disk. Best-effort — silently ignores errors.
